executives.name: Richard Adkerson
executives.background: Mr. Adkerson has served as Chairman of the Board since 2021 and Chief Executive Officer since 2003. He has been a director of the company since 2006. He previously served as President from 2008 to 2021 and Chief Financial Officer from 2000 to 2003.

executives.name: Kathleen Quirk
executives.background: Ms. Quirk has served as President since 2021 and was appointed Chief Executive Officer effective June 2024. She previously served as Chief Financial Officer from 2003 to 2022 and has been with the company since 1989.

executives.name: Marelee Felton
executives.background: Ms. Felton has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since 2022. She previously served as Senior Vice President and Controller from 2013 to 2022.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Douglas Currault II
executives.background: Mr. Currault has served as Senior Vice President and General Counsel since 2021. He joined the company in 2011 and has held various legal roles.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and General Counsel

board_of_directors.name: Richard Adkerson
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of the Board and CEO of Freeport-McMoRan Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Dustan McCoy
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Brunswick Corporation. Lead Independent Director of FCX.

board_of_directors.name: David Abney
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Chairman and CEO of United Parcel Service, Inc. (UPS).

board_of_directors.name: Lydia Kennard
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of KDG Construction Consulting. Former Executive Director of Los Angeles World Airports.

board_of_directors.name: Sara Grootwassink Lewis
board_of_directors.background: Founder and CEO of Lewis Advisors. Former CFO of Washington Real Estate Investment Trust.

board_of_directors.name: Kathleen Quirk
board_of_directors.background: President and incoming CEO of Freeport-McMoRan Inc.

board_of_directors.name: John Stephens
board_of_directors.background: Former Senior Executive Vice President and CFO of AT&T Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Frances Fragos Townsend
board_of_directors.background: Former Assistant to the President for Homeland Security and Counterterrorism. Former EVP at Activision Blizzard.
